positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric composition featuring intertwined stylized constellations and ethereal celestial bodies. The core design is a symmetrical arrangement of glowing, matte gold lines connecting stylized, solid-color planets (deep indigo, cosmic teal, muted lavender). The style should be modern Art Deco meets cosmic minimalism, rendered with strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The background should be a solid, subtle midnight blue, suitable for printing on dark fabric. Excellent print resolution, highly detailed vector quality, sharp focus, suitable for t-shirt apparel print, central composition, rule of thirds for placement.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, grainy, text, watermark, signature, artifact, cartoon, comic, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, dirty, grayscale, low contrast
